title: Issuance of license; fee
doc_html:
§35.  Issuance of license; fee

If the mayor or the governing authority of the parish of location is satisfied from the application required by R.S. 51:34 that the proposed sale is of the character which the applicant desires to conduct and advertise, he shall issue a license, upon the payment of the fee of twenty-five dollars, to the person applying, authorizing him to advertise and conduct a sale of the particular kind mentioned in the application according to the requirements of this Part.  

Acts 1986, No. 806, §1.

If the mayor or the governing authority of the parish of location is satisfied from the application required by R.S. 51:34 that the proposed sale is of the character which the applicant desires to conduct and advertise, he shall issue a license, upon the payment of the fee of twenty-five dollars, to the person applying, authorizing him to advertise and conduct a sale of the particular kind mentioned in the application according to the requirements of this Part.
Acts 1986, No. 806, §1.
